content: Start the concept note interview for Porto Alegre. Use the /concept-note skill flow. Always use the ask_user tool for multiple-choice questions instead of writing them as text.
I'll start the concept note interview for Porto Alegre following the structured flow.

Perfect! I've started the concept note interview for Porto Alegre. We're now in **Phase 1: Project Identification**.

I've auto-filled what I know from the city profile:
- **Municipality**: Porto Alegre
- **State**: Rio Grande do Sul

Now I need your input on three key decisions to define the project scope. Please answer the multiple-choice questions that have appeared in the interface.
NBS for flood and heat; Adaptação e Mitigação; SMAMUS - Secretaria Municipal do Meio Ambiente, Urbanismo e Sustentabilidade
Excellent! I'll now auto-fill what we know and advance to the next phase.

Great! We've moved to **Phase 2: Context & Diagnosis**. 

I've auto-filled the territorial context describing Porto Alegre's unique geography (transition between Atlantic Forest and Pampa biomes, 40 hills, Guaíba waterfront) and the climate vulnerabilities highlighting the catastrophic May 2024 floods.

Now I need your input on two key questions to define the project scope and objectives. Please respond with your selections.

Selected 3 intervention zones:
- zone_12: HEAT risk, 103.0 km², population 830,967.911, intervention: cooling network, flood score 0.43, heat score 0.62
- zone_8: HEAT risk, 30.0 km², population 240,178.998, intervention: sponge network, flood score 0.60, heat score 0.60
- zone_14: FLOOD risk, 173.0 km², population 260,889.433, intervention: sponge network, flood score 0.56, heat score 0.26
Total: 306.0 km², 1,332,036.342 people
Hazards: HEAT, FLOOD
Interventions: cooling network, sponge network; Aumentar a resiliência climática urbana através de soluções baseadas na natureza; Áreas de planície aluvial junto ao Guaíba e Arroio Dilúvio; Aumentar a resiliência climática urbana através de soluções baseadas na natureza
Perfect! I'll now update the concept note with this detailed spatial information and advance to solution design.

Continue the concept note interview from Phase 2. Here is what has been filled so far:
project_id: sector: Soluções Baseadas na Natureza (NBS); focus: Adaptação climática (enchentes e ilhas de calor) e mitigação (sequestro de carbo; municipality: Porto Alegre; state: Rio Grande do Sul
proponent: municipality: Porto Alegre; state: Rio Grande do Sul; institution_name: Secretaria Municipal do Meio Ambiente, Urbanismo e Sustentabilidade (SMAMUS); institution_type: Secretaria Municipal - Prefeitura de Porto Alegre
territorial_context: description: Porto Alegre é a capital e maior cidade do Rio Grande do Sul, com população esti
problem_diagnosis: climate_vulnerabilities: As enchentes de maio de 2024 foram o pior desastre natural da história do Rio Gr

Pick up where we left off — ask the next questions needed.

Great! I've updated the territorial context with the detailed zone information and we're now in **Phase 3: Solution Design**.

I need your input on:
1. **Which NBS intervention types** to include (you can select multiple for an integrated approach)
2. **Project maturity stage** (this affects what kind of funding you can access)

Please make your selections.
